# Superfoods Partners

> Hong Kong–based B2B superfood sourcing & trading. Every batch verified, documented and traceable, routed through one trusted hub. The sourcing arm of the Pure Matcha Partners family.

## What we supply
- Matcha — ceremonial, premium, culinary (Organic & Conventional; Japan and China)
- Hojicha — charcoal-roasted green tea (Organic & Conventional; Japan and China)
- Specialty tea powders — Jasmine, Oolong, Earl Grey (Fujian & East China)
- Ube — purple yam (Philippines and China)
- Lion's Mane — fruiting-body, for nutraceutical formulation (China)
- Hibiscus (East China and Egypt)
- 13 origins across 4 countries (Japan, China, Philippines, Egypt); wider sourcing on request

## How we work
- MOQ from 25 kg to full container volume
- Every batch lab-tested — pesticide residue, heavy metals, microbiology, radiation — with a Verification Record™ and full COA
- Lead times 2–4 weeks; Incoterms FOB / CIF / DDP
- Certifications: JAS, EU Organic, USDA Organic, HACCP, FSSC 22000, Kosher
- One hub: Hong Kong (22.32°N 114.17°E)

## Who we supply
Beverage manufacturers, supplement & nutraceutical brands, foodservice & QSR chains, private label & co-packers, distributors & importers.

## Markets
International (English), plus Australia, Taiwan, Indonesia, India, China and Hong Kong.

## Contact
Request a volume quote — a lab report and quote typically follow within 48 hours.
